subcodes.title: Cablegram
subcodes.first_line: I AM SERVANT OF BAHA HIS HOLINESS BAHAULLAH IS UNIQUE AND PEERLESS ALL MUST TURN
subcodes.first_line_orig: من عبدالبهاء هستم حضرت بهاء الله بی مثل و نظیر است کل باید توجه به بهاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
